# SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Security Interface ](/documentation/securityinterface)

- [ SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange ](/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange)

-  SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange 

Global Variable# SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange

macOS 10.3+

```
let SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange#Discussion)

Sent when the disclosure triangle is opened or closed.

## [See Also](/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFCertificateViewDisclosureStateDidChange#Constants)

[Plug-in View Keys](/documentation/securityinterface/plug-in-view-keys)Keys for the user dictionary passed to [`willActivate(withUser:)`](/documentation/securityinterface/sfauthorizationpluginview/willactivate(withuser:)).[`let SFDisplayViewException: String`](/documentation/securityinterface/sfdisplayviewexception)Raised when an error occurs in displaying the authorization dialog.
